project_type: Next.js 16 + TypeScript multi-agent debate system with Prisma ORM and SQLite
build_system: npm with Next.js build tooling; no scripts/ directory exists yet
test_framework: Vitest with vitest.setup.ts, tests are co-located as *.test.ts files in src/lib/
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx vitest run to confirm all tests pass. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm type-checking passes.
environment_constraints: LLM calls require API keys (LLM_API_KEY, LLM_API_ENDPOINT). For testing, mock the LLM provider. The baseline runner script needs actual API access to run against a real repo, but the comparison logic and structure can be validated with unit tests using mocked data.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md warns that Next.js APIs may differ from training data. Use @/ path aliases (tsconfig paths). Tests use vitest globals (describe, it, expect). Zod 4.x is used for schema validation.
key_patterns: Agent outputs validated via Zod schemas in src/schemas/. LLM calls go through createLLMProvider() from src/lib/llm-provider.ts. Tool loop in src/lib/agent-tool-loop.ts uses runProposalToolLoop with MAX_TOOL_CALLS_PER_AGENT=6. Structured outputs: ProposalOutput has summary, recommendations, risks, assumptions, confidence, artifactSuggestions, references, needsClarification. ConsensusOutput has agreements, disagreements, recommendedDecisions, identifiedRisks, openQuestions, overallConfidence. Prompt building via PromptBuilderImpl in src/lib/prompt-builder.ts.
directory_structure: src/lib/ - core library modules (orchestrator, executors, providers). src/schemas/ - Zod validation schemas. src/types/domain.ts - all TypeScript interfaces. src/app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes. No scripts/ directory exists yet.
